source.reference: ACE3 ballistics:  ACE3: caliber=6.706mm, mass=9.072g, drag=7, BC=[0.317]. Velocities: 750.0m/s@254.0mm, 820.0m/s@406.4mm, 840.0m/s@508.0mm, 852.0m/s@609.6mm, 860.0m/s@660.4mm
source.methodology: Values sourced from ACE3 Advanced Ballistics configuration data. ACE3 sources its data from a mix of IRL references, manufacturer data, and community estimates.
